wrong_choice_explanations.が: が marks subjects or objects of preference — it doesn't fit here because 本 is the direct object being read, not the subject performing the action.
wrong_choice_explanations.は: は marks topics — it doesn't fit here because 本 is the direct object being acted upon, not the topic being discussed.
wrong_choice_explanations.に: に indicates direction, time, or location — it doesn't fit here because 本 is the object being read, not a destination or time.

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が marks subjects or desired objects with たい — it doesn't fit here because コーヒー is the direct object of the transitive verb 飲む, not the subject.
wrong_choice_explanations.で: で indicates location of action or means — it doesn't fit here because コーヒー is what was drunk, not where or how the drinking occurred.
wrong_choice_explanations.と: と means 'with' or 'and' — it doesn't fit here because コーヒー is the object being consumed, not something accompanying the action.

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が marks subjects — it doesn't fit here because テレビ is the direct object being watched, not the subject doing the watching.
wrong_choice_explanations.は: は marks topics for contrast or general statements — it doesn't fit here because テレビ is the specific object being watched, not a topic for discussion.
wrong_choice_explanations.で: で indicates location or means — it doesn't fit here because テレビ is what is watched, not the location where watching occurs.

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が marks subjects — it doesn't fit here because 宿題 is the direct object being done, not the subject performing the action.
wrong_choice_explanations.に: に indicates direction, time, or location — it doesn't fit here because 宿題 is the object of the action する, not a destination or time.
wrong_choice_explanations.から: から means 'from' or 'because' — it doesn't fit here because 宿題 is what is being done, not a starting point or reason.

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が marks subjects or can indicate what is heard with 聞こえる — it doesn't fit here because with 聞く (active listening), 音楽 is the direct object.
wrong_choice_explanations.は: は marks topics — it doesn't fit here because 音楽 is the specific object being listened to, not a topic for general comment.
wrong_choice_explanations.と: と means 'with' or 'and' — it doesn't fit here because 音楽 is what is being listened to, not something accompanying the listener.

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が marks subjects — it doesn't fit here because 手紙 is the direct object being written, not the subject doing the writing.
wrong_choice_explanations.に: に can indicate the recipient of a letter — it doesn't fit here because 手紙 is what was written, not who received it.
wrong_choice_explanations.で: で indicates means or location — it doesn't fit here because 手紙 is the object created, not the tool or place used for writing.

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が marks subjects — it doesn't fit here because 映画 is the direct object being watched, not the subject performing the action.
wrong_choice_explanations.は: は marks topics — it doesn't fit here because 映画 is the specific object that was watched, not a topic being discussed.
wrong_choice_explanations.から: から means 'from' — it doesn't fit here because 映画 is what was watched, not a starting point or source.

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が marks subjects — it doesn't fit here because 窓 is the direct object being opened, not the subject doing the opening.
wrong_choice_explanations.に: に indicates direction or location — it doesn't fit here because 窓 is what is being opened, not a destination or position.
wrong_choice_explanations.で: で indicates location of action or means — it doesn't fit here because 窓 is the object being acted upon, not the location or tool for the action.

exercises.example_sentence: 日本語__勉強しています。

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が marks subjects — it doesn't fit here because 日本語 is the direct object being studied, not the subject doing the studying.
wrong_choice_explanations.は: は marks topics — it doesn't fit here because 日本語 is the specific subject being studied, not a topic for general discussion.
wrong_choice_explanations.と: と means 'with' or 'and' — it doesn't fit here because 日本語 is what is being studied, not something accompanying the study session.

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が marks subjects — it doesn't fit here because 車 is the direct object being driven, not the subject doing the driving.
wrong_choice_explanations.で: で can indicate means of transportation — it doesn't fit here because we're talking about driving the car as an action, not using it as transportation means.
wrong_choice_explanations.に: に indicates direction or location — it doesn't fit here because 車 is the vehicle being operated, not a destination.
